name: Zucchini Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 12-cup muffin pan with cooking spray or line with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, pecans, oatmeal, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs, then stir in the shredded zucchini and oil.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
6. Spoon the batter evenly into the prepared muffin cups.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
